query:
SELECT 
  apiFootballEnabled,
  apiFootballKeyConfigured,
  apiFootballKey IS NOT NULL AND apiFootballKey != '' AS hasKey,
  LEFT(apiFootballKey, 6) AS keyPrefix,
  apiFootballQuotaLimit,
  apiFootballSyncFixtures,
  apiFootballSyncResults,
  apiFootballLeagueId,
  apiFootballSeason,
  apiFootballLastSync,
  apiFootballCircuitOpen,
  apiFootballCircuitOpenAt
FROM (
  SELECT 
    apiFootballEnabled,
    CASE WHEN apiFootballKey IS NOT NULL AND apiFootballKey != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS apiFootballKeyConfigured,
    apiFootballKey,
    apiFootballQuotaLimit,
    apiFootballSyncFixtures,
    apiFootballSyncResults,
    apiFootballLeagueId,
    apiFootballSeason,
    apiFootballLastSync,
    apiFootballCircuitOpen,
    apiFootballCircuitOpenAt
  FROM platform_settings WHERE id = 1
) t;
